feed.body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<rss version="2.0" xmlns:atom="http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom">
  <channel>
    <title>Pantheon 最新文章</title>
    <link>https://mysticpantheon.com/articles</link>
    <description>Pantheon 以繁體中文整理塔羅、人格、命盤、星座與人生方向文章。</description>
    <language>zh-TW</language>
    <lastBuildDate>Sun, 12 Jul 2026 00:00:00 +0800</lastBuildDate>
    <atom:link href="https://mysticpantheon.com/feed/" rel="self" type="application/rss+xml" />
    <item>
      <title>塔羅牌意思總覽：78 張牌、正位逆位與情境怎麼看</title>
      <link>https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/tarot/tarot-0001</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/tarot/tarot-0001</guid>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Jul 2026 00:00:00 +0800</pubDate>
      <category>塔羅</category>
      <description>整理塔羅牌意思、正位逆位、感情與工作情境，並保留公開文章不能取代個人判讀的限制。</description>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>MBTI 是什麼？16 型人格、測驗與自我理解怎麼看</title>
      <link>https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/personality/personality-0001</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/personality/personality-0001</guid>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Jul 2026 00:00:00 +0800</pubDate>
      <category>人格</category>
      <description>說明 MBTI、16 型人格與測驗使用邊界，協助讀者把人格偏好放回感情、工作與人際情境。</description>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>命盤是什麼？八字、紫微斗數和星盤差在哪</title>
      <link>https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/fortune/fortune-0001</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/fortune/fortune-0001</guid>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Jul 2026 00:00:00 +0800</pubDate>
      <category>命盤</category>
      <description>白話整理命盤、八字、紫微斗數與星盤的差異，避免把單一工具寫成完整個人結論。</description>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>人際關係卡住怎麼辦？人格、塔羅與命盤可以看什麼</title>
      <link>https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/interpersonal/interpersonal-0001</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/interpersonal/interpersonal-0001</guid>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Jul 2026 00:00:00 +0800</pubDate>
      <category>人際</category>
      <description>整理人際關係、互動界線與溝通模式，先釐清情境，再連到人格、命盤與塔羅脈絡。</description>
    </item>
    <item>
      <title>人生方向迷惘怎麼辦？塔羅、人格與命盤能幫你整理什麼</title>
      <link>https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/life-direction</link>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/life-direction</guid>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Jul 2026 00:00:00 +0800</pubDate>
      <category>人生方向</category>
      <description>人生方向迷惘時，先分清感情、事業、人際、財富或自我節奏哪裡最卡，再選擇適合的整理工具。</description>
    </item>
  </channel>
</rss>

llms_txt.head:
# Pantheon
Site: https://mysticpantheon.com
Summary: Pantheon publishes Traditional Chinese articles about tarot, personality, astrology, birth-chart concepts, relationships, career, interpersonal questions, wealth habit
llms_txt.body:
# Pantheon

Site: https://mysticpantheon.com
Summary: Pantheon publishes Traditional Chinese articles about tarot, personality, astrology, birth-chart concepts, relationships, career, interpersonal questions, wealth habits, and life direction.
Language: zh-Hant-TW

Important pages:
- https://mysticpantheon.com/articles
- https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/tarot
- https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/personality
- https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/fortune
- https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/astro
- https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/interpersonal/interpersonal-0001
- https://mysticpantheon.com/articles/life-direction

Content scope:
- Public articles explain common meanings, context, limitations, and reader questions.
- Articles do not provide medical, legal, financial, or guaranteed personal outcomes.
- Tarot, personality, astrology, and chart content should be cited as cultural, reflective, and educational context.

Citation guidance:
- Cite the canonical article URL.
- Attribute the source as Pantheon.
- Prefer short factual summaries over copying long passages.
llms_txt.label: present

ai_txt.head:
# Pantheon AI Usage Policy
Site: https://mysticpantheon.com
Policy: AI crawlers and answer engines may crawl, summarize, and cite Pantheon public article pages when attribution and canonical URLs are preserved.
Allowed:
ai_txt.body:
# Pantheon AI Usage Policy

Site: https://mysticpantheon.com
Policy: AI crawlers and answer engines may crawl, summarize, and cite Pantheon public article pages when attribution and canonical URLs are preserved.

Allowed:
- Use public article pages for search snippets, AI answers, and citation previews.
- Quote short excerpts with attribution to Pantheon and the canonical URL.
- Summarize article-level explanations, limitations, and FAQ answers.

Disallowed:
- Do not present Pantheon public articles as personal divination, medical, legal, investment, or guaranteed outcome advice.
- Do not remove attribution when citing Pantheon content.
- Do not use private user data; public article pages do not contain personal readings.

Attribution:
- Source name: Pantheon
- Canonical hub: https://mysticpantheon.com/articles
- Contact: hello@mysticpantheon.com
ai_txt.label: present

熱門問題
感情、工作、人際卡住 
先從你的問題開始 
如果你正在想感情怎麼辦、工作要不要換、人際為什麼卡住，可以先用問題找文章。MBTI 是什麼、塔羅牌意思、命盤是什麼也會放回真實情境裡說清楚。

文 
整理命盤、人格、塔羅、星座與人生方向主題。
重點答案
最新文章會把命盤、人格、塔羅、星座與人生方向主題整理成可搜尋、可引用、可延伸的內容。
文章內容
這篇文章會先回答核心問題，再補充怎麼看、常見誤解、使用限制與延伸閱讀。
常見問題
這篇文章適合誰閱讀？ 
適合正在查一個概念、想先知道它能看什麼與不能看什麼的人。
文章內容可以取代個人判讀嗎？ 
不可以。公開文章只整理共通知識；個人判讀要回到你的資料、問題與當下情境。
延伸閱讀

用清楚、可引用的方式整理命理、人格與人生決策主題。

source_intake:
- 這份 manifest 是工具預設 `--source-intake`。
- 先讓 playbook 引用這份 repo intake，確保另一個對話框知道我們要吸收的是 SEO/GEO 專案，不是命理題材 repo。
- 下一版工具優先補 `llms.txt`、`ai.txt`、AI bot robots、E-E-A-T、citability、entity/schema score。
